modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook crashes when sending or deleting emails.

full_description_text: I was using Outlook 2013 and it just closes when I try to send or delete emails. Also, it opens two windows sometimes. When I try to add a Zoom meeting, it just shows a blank page. There’s an error about the file in my AppData, and it says the operation failed.
short_description: Outlook crashes when sending or deleting emails.
description: I was using Outlook 2013 and it just closes when I try to send or delete emails. Also, it opens two windows sometimes. When I try to add a Zoom meeting, it just shows a blank page. There’s an error about the file in my AppData, and it says the operation failed.
